head.title: PORTAL AKADEMIK SIMODARO

body.class: bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 h-screen w-screen flex flex-col md:flex-row overflow-hidden transition-colors duration-300

div.class: fixed inset-0 bg-slate-950 z-[9999] flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-all duration-700 pointer-events-auto
absolute w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 blur-xl animate-ping
p-5 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-tr from-emerald-600 to-teal-500 shadow-2xl text-white relative

h1.class: text-lg font-black tracking-[0.2em] display-font bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-400 to-teal-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent uppercase

p.class: text-[9px] font-mono tracking-widest text-emerald-500 uppercase font-bold

div.class: w-32 h-[2px] bg-slate-900 rounded-full mx-auto overflow-hidden

aside.class: w-full md:w-80 md:h-full shrink-0 bg-slate-900 border-b md:border-b-0 md:border-r border-slate-800 flex flex-col justify-between z-30 overflow-hidden

div.class: p-2 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-tr from-emerald-600 to-teal-500 shadow-lg text-white

h1.class: text-xs font-black tracking-widest display-font bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-400 to-teal-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent

button.class: p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-850 border border-slate-750 text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800 transition shadow-md cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center shrink-0
button.title: Ganti Tema Terang/Gelap

div.class: p-3.5 bg-slate-950 rounded-xl border border-slate-800/80 space-y-3

span.class: text-[9px] uppercase font-mono tracking-wider text-emerald-400 block font-bold border-l border-emerald-500 pl-1.5

label.class: text-[8px] uppercase font-mono tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-bold block

span.class: text-[8.5px] font-bold text-emerald-400 cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1 animate-pulse
span.title: Butuh GuruID?

div.class: absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 w-64 p-3 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 text-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity pointer-events-none z-50 text-[9px] font-medium leading-relaxed text-justify

div.div: INFO AKUN GURUID Silakan hubungi admin untuk mendapatkan GuruID resmi SMAN 1 Amonggedo agar data perangkat ajar Anda dapat tersimpan di cloud.

input.class: w-full px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800/80 rounded-lg text-[9.5px] text-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 placeholder:text-slate-600 font-mono

label.class: text-[8px] uppercase font-mono tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-bold block

input.class: w-full px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800/80 rounded-lg text-[9.5px] text-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 placeholder:text-slate-600

label.class: text-[8px] uppercase font-mono tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-bold block

div.label: KUNCI INTEGRASI AI GEMINI:

input.class: w-full px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800/80 rounded-lg text-[9.5px] text-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 placeholder:text-slate-600 font-mono

div.p: Dapatkan API Key Gratis di Google AI Studio

button.class: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 py-2 px-3 bg-[#10b981] hover:bg-[#059669] text-slate-950 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-mono font-extrabold tracking-wide transition uppercase shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/10 hover:shadow-emerald-500/20 cursor-pointer

a.class: flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 py-1.5 px-3 bg-emerald-500/10 hover:bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20 hover:border-emerald-500/40 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wide transition uppercase

details.class: group bg-slate-900/60 border border-slate-850 rounded-lg overflow-hidden text-[8px]

summary.class: flex items-center justify-between p-2.5 cursor-pointer list-none font-mono font-black text-amber-500 uppercase select-none

div.class: px-2.5 pb-2.5 space-y-1.5 border-t border-slate-800/50 mt-1 pt-2
div.p: Dukung operasional secara sukarela via DANA / OVO / GOPAY:

p.class: font-mono text-emerald-400 text-center mt-1 font-black text-[9px]

div.class: flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[8.5px] font-mono font-black text-amber-500 uppercase
space-y-1.5 p-2.5 bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-850 rounded-lg

label.class: text-[7.5px] uppercase font-mono tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-bold block

select.class: w-full px-2 py-1 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-md text-[8.5px] text-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 font-mono

label.class: text-[7.5px] uppercase font-mono tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-bold block

textarea.class: w-full p-2 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-md text-[8.5px] text-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 placeholder:text-slate-600 leading-normal resize-none
textarea.placeholder: Tulis saran, keluhan, masukan untuk perbaikan atau update fitur...

button.class: w-full py-1.5 px-3 bg-amber-500/10 hover:bg-amber-500/20 border border-amber-500/20 hover:border-amber-500/40 text-amber-400 rounded-lg text-[8px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wider transition uppercase

div.p: Identitas ini akan diteruskan ke semua modul yang dibuka di sebelah kanan secara otomatis. Anda tidak perlu mengulang proses login atau pengisian data.

main.class: flex-1 bg-slate-950 flex flex-col overflow-hidden relative

header.class: bg-slate-900 border-b border-slate-800 flex flex-col p-4 shrink-0 gap-3.5 z-20

div.class: flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between w-full gap-3

button.class: p-2 bg-slate-950 hover:bg-slate-850 text-emerald-400 rounded-lg border border-slate-800 hover:text-emerald-350 transition cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 shadow-lg
button.title: Buka/Tutup Menu Samping

h2.class: text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest text-emerald-400 uppercase font-black

span.class: text-xs font-black tracking-wide display-font text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 mt-0.5
absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center pl-2.5 pointer-events-none text-slate-500

input.class: w-32 sm:w-40 pl-7 pr-2.5 py-1.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg text-[9px] text-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 placeholder:text-slate-600 font-mono

button.class: p-1.5 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-750 text-slate-300 rounded-lg border border-slate-700 hover:text-white transition cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-mono
p-1.5 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white rounded-lg border border-indigo-500 hover:text-white transition cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-sans font-bold shadow-md
button.title: Buka di Tab Baru untuk Login Google

button.class: p-1.5 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-750 text-amber-500 rounded-lg border border-slate-700 hover:text-amber-400 transition cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-mono
button.title: Admin & Developer Hub

div.class: flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 pt-2.5 border-t border-slate-800/80 pr-1 relative z-50 overflow-visible

iframe.sandbox: allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-forms allow-top-navigation allow-downloads

div.class: absolute inset-0 bg-slate-950 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center p-6 hidden
p-4 rounded-full bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/20 text-amber-500 mb-4 animate-bounce

h2.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-100 display-font uppercase tracking-wider

p.class: text-sm text-slate-400 mt-2 max-w-md mx-auto leading-relaxed

div.p: Modul ini belum diluncurkan secara resmi oleh Admin SMAN 1 Amonggedo. Silakan periksa kembali beberapa waktu ke depan!

p.class: text-[10px] text-slate-600 mt-2 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest

div.p: siModArO v.1 - Administrasi Setahun Tuntas Sekejap
